name: Peoples Bank And Trust Company
description_short: Community bank offering personal and business banking services with a focus on agriculture lending. Operates in Oklahoma with locations in Ryan and Edmond.
description_long:
Peoples Bank & Trust Company is a community bank headquartered in Ryan, Oklahoma, with a branch location in Edmond. The bank has established itself as a Certified Preferred SBA Lender, indicating it participates in Small Business Administration lending programs. With roots in agricultural communities, the bank has developed specialized expertise in serving farm and ranch operations alongside traditional consumer and business banking customers.

The bank provides a comprehensive suite of banking products designed for both personal and business customers. Personal offerings include checking and savings accounts, certificates of deposit (CDs), individual retirement accounts (IRAs), personal credit cards, and online banking with mobile access. For business customers, Peoples Bank offers business checking and savings accounts, business credit cards, merchant processing solutions, SBA loans, business lines of credit, and business online banking with bill pay capabilities. The bank emphasizes agriculture lending as a specialty area, noting extensive background and knowledge in serving agricultural clients.

Peoples Bank distinguishes itself through its community-focused approach and agricultural lending expertise. As a Certified Preferred SBA Lender, it demonstrates commitment to supporting small business growth. The bank offers merchant processing with features like on-screen signature capture and the ability to accept multiple payment types. Its agriculture lending division represents a competitive advantage in rural Oklahoma markets where farm and ranch financing is essential.

The bank operates with limited geographic reach, currently serving only two Oklahoma locations. Like most traditional banks, it requires customers to visit physical branches or use online/mobile banking for certain transactions. The website provides limited detail on specific loan terms, interest rates, or fees, requiring customers to contact branches directly for detailed product information. For consumers seeking nationwide digital banking convenience or specialized fintech features, larger regional or national banks may offer more options. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Certificates of deposit (CDs) and individual retirement accounts (IRAs)
Personal credit cards for credit building and purchases
Personal online banking with mobile access
Business online banking with bill pay functionality
pros: Certified Preferred SBA Lender status demonstrates credibility for small business loans
Specialized agriculture lending with extensive background serving farm and ranch operations
Comprehensive business services including merchant processing with signature capture
Online and mobile banking available for both personal and business accounts
Business bill pay functionality for streamlined business banking
Dual branch locations providing some geographic coverage in Oklahoma
Offers CD and IRA products for savings and retirement planning
cons: Very limited geographic footprint with only two branch locations in Oklahoma
Website provides minimal transparency on interest rates, fees, or specific loan terms
No mention of ATM network beyond basic ATM locator tool
Limited online presence and product information compared to larger regional banks
Requires direct contact with branches for detailed account and loan information
best_for: Oklahoma-based agricultural businesses and farm operations seeking specialized lending
Small business owners in the Ryan and Edmond areas needing SBA-backed financing
Community bank customers in rural Oklahoma preferring local relationship banking
Business owners needing merchant processing and business credit card solutions
diagnosis: Peoples Bank & Trust Company is best for Oklahoma-based consumers and agricultural businesses seeking community banking with specialized farm lending expertise and small business support through SBA programs. The primary caveat is geographic limitation—with only two branch locations in Oklahoma, this bank is inaccessible to most consumers outside the Ryan and Edmond areas, and limited online product transparency may require direct contact with branches for detailed information.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
